summary: All three requirements (REQ-14, REQ-15, REQ-16) appear to be implemented. The backend getOpenOrders() function is added to main.mo, the useOpenOrders hook is added to useQueries.ts with 10s polling, and OpenOrdersPanel.tsx is created and integrated into App.tsx. One minor concern: the backend getOpenOrders() creates a separate ICDexWithOpenOrders actor type rather than using the existing icDex binding, but functionally it still calls the correct canister. All ACs appear satisfied.

hallucinated_features.description: A separate ICDexWithOpenOrders actor type is defined in main.mo alongside the existing ICDex type, duplicating interface definitions rather than extending the existing ICDex binding.
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec says the function must be self-contained and not modify existing functions, but defining a parallel actor interface type was not requested. This introduces an unused or redundant type definition not mentioned in the requirements.
